The room was very small and the bathroom needs some renovation   Breakfast was very good especially sushi rolls The design of the public areas was modern and stylish The reception staff were very friendly

Receptionist not helpful The temperature of the air conditioning in the room cannot be controlled in the room the staff has to do it over the system They refused to lower the temperature below 20 degree Celsius It is summer and it s hot Can t even get proper sleep No plastic laundry bags provided Only provide a line bag with the words NOT COMPLIMENTARY sewn on it

You can t control the room temperature yourself It is monitored the same for everyone and it is a locked control We were hot in our room and would have liked it cooler   The bed and the linens are comfy Great location next to metro stop

It s not that close to downtown Milan but still managable   The staff at the front desk Very friendly and very accommodating The design of the hotel is very hip Breakfast comes with a view as it s served on the top floor

Breakfast can be quite limited if you turn up later than 9 15am  Excellent value for money friendly relaxed environment Fantastic location for transport metro only short walk away and 15 minutes from the city centre Interesting rooms especially the giant lampshade Comfy beds and a good shower Breakfast had a good variety of choices and decent size glasses for your morning juice Staff are always at hand and very polite

Rooms are a little too small   A Modern hotel Five min walk to Metro station Udine green line Restaurants supermarket and shops all very close It s in a residential area close to park Very good breakfast as well and staff were professional and polite

Rooms are really nice but fairly small the complete absence of a closet just a rack with few hangers is provided makes it uncomfortable for any stay over few days  The restaurant where breakfast is served has a great view and outdoor

Very expensive transfer from the airport for such a small distance There were no windows in the room The air conditioning is off upon arrival by default you need to ask reception to turn it on But even after that it was working very badly   Clean rooms good breakfast good room accessories bathroom items slippers robes teapot

We couldn t open the window blackout but didn t matter for one night stay The juice in the breakfast was artificial   The hotel room decoration is very nice definitely a design hotel The facilities in the room are good so are the amenities It s quite close to the metro station and the breakfast is very good served in this amazing restaurant space in the rooftop

Although the overall design of the hotel is quite stylish the rooms are a bit shabby and need renovation Also a huge lamp hanging from the ceiling just above the bed gives you some kind of a creepy feeling   The location is quite convenient the hotel is located very close to the Metro station and it takes about 20 minutes to get the the center Free parking subject to availability though is another big plus at many hotels in Milan you have to pay 15 30 euros a day for parking Breakfast was very tasty and fresh Beds are very comfortable Staff is professional efficient and friendly When we arrived there was some unpleasant smell coming from the ventilation system which we reported to the Reception and left for a city walk The problem was totally fixed by the time we came back Would recommend this hotel

I asked for two single beds found instead a double bed with a wooden plank to separate the two matresses it looked so weird I think it should be said in advance maybe its normal for the owners they are chinese I never saw this anywhere else Anyway the beds were absoultely comfortable   Comfortable and quiet room
Nothing   This hotel is honestly amazing It s designed in a fresh modern and clear style Really awesome I warmly recommend it It is located about 100 m from subway metro station

everything was perfect the hotel is situated in a safe area close to the metro green line the breakfast is absolutely delicious it is very rich in options the standard double room is not big but it is smartly designed the room has all the amenities for a 4 star hotel
The bed was small short I m not so tall 180cm and my feet were outside the bed I requested to have a comfortable bed but it was not possible without a room upgrade   Nice style design and location
room far too hot we asked how to lower the temperature and we have ben told that it was not possible the rooms do not have a control   bed comfy clean room

Everything was just great The rooms are tastefully decorated and extremely clean the breakfast in a beautiful restaurant on the top floor with a wide choice of tasty dishes fresh pastry and nice coffee Staff is friendly and helpfull We were with a car and an option of a free parking was very convinient for us location of the hotel in a few steps from the metro station allows you not to use your own transport in Milan Highly recommended
just minor things just as there is no place to hang towels in the bathroom   Nice modern rooms comfortable bed friendly staff good breakfast clean
Trying to find a place to park my car near the hotel wasn t that easy to be honest  The staff was extra nice I also liked the large and warm bed and the cheesecake I had for breakfast
Instructions on how to use the remote for the blinds   The overall d cor of the hotel and the double shower Breakfast was good with ample variety of food Free parking

Hotel_Name: Hotel Magna Pars Small Luxury Hotels of the World
Full_Review: N A  Hotel is located in the creative heart of Milan surrounded by restaurants and small boutiques You won t see any selfie sticks or umbrella guided tours around you but you might bump into fashionistas or other creatives It is 20 25min walk from Duomo Hotel has an excellent in house restaurant DA NOI IN where we had a fabulous dinner in there Breakfast was excellent too I can t find any faults during my stay as it was truly fabulous From high quality furniture interior finishes Hi Tech room controls to olfactory experience that is deep routed in the history of the hotel ex perfume factory You must stop at LabSolue perfumery located on the G floor where you can learn about smells and buy perfumes too Oh and all rooms have different smells If you like lavender smell ask for room no15 Enjoy

I want to express my extreme dissatisfaction with the service I received during my stay in Windsor Hotel Although it s a four star hotel the things that they allow themselves to do towards their guests are absolutely disrespectful They don t deserve even a one star I was woken up early in the morning 8 40 a m by the sound of a hammer and then a heavy drill What a wonderful beginning of the day being on vocation At the reception desk I was informed that there was nothing to complain about they are sorry but there was just a complete reconstruction of 5 rooms in their hotel and this persistent sound would continue from 8 40 a m till 4 00 p m I was offered a room on the upper floor but does it make sense The sound was everywhere since it was not like changing a picture from one place to another one it was a complete reconstruction Is it fair to your guests being put in front of the fact of waking up every morning at 8 40 with such a pleasant sound of the knocking hammer and the drill leaving no other options If it was possible on Booking com I would attach the video with this terrible sound so you could feel it They asked me to give them my credit card for a guarantee when I was checking in and having no idea what I m going to deal with In such cases I would like to take the credit card of Windsor Hotel and ask them to compensate my spoiled holiday and their unbearable service Luckily my bad experience in this hotel lasted for 2 days but I felt so sorry for people who had a longer stay or guests with small children I saw a couple of other guests at the reception desk who were interested in what was going on To my mind respectful hotels which do care about their reputation will never force their guests to go through this stress and sufferings on vocation These respectful hotels do close for a period of reconstruction in order not to disturb their clients and open again when everything is ready

We ate twice at the adjacent restaurant Clothilde once for lunch and once for breakfast We found the staff arrogant and unhelpful We arrived at noon and took a seat at the front window and ordered from the menu on the table After our order was placed a different server informed us the eggs could not be cooked anymore and said I should order from the lunch menu and handed me one I asked if I could order another muesli and yogurt instead since that order was accepted already and a coffee He said okay and left After some time only one order of Muesli and one coffee was served We told our 1st waiter that we had ordered two of each and he left Some minutes later he returned with a smaller bowl with a tiny amount a yogurt and a pile of cornflakes no muesli At that point we gave up finished our coffees paid the bill and left Our second experience was at the breakfast buffet provided to hotel guests between 7 am to 10 am In general the buffet offering was satisfactory to good The one complaint we had was the coffee served from an thermal dispenser was scorched and virtually undrinkable Though we did not complain about the coffee once again we found the staff aloof and arrogant not warm and welcoming Our Booking com reservation indicated a welcome drink upon arrival We arrived a 10 am after an international flight and the front desk asked us to wait until 2 30 pm Fortunately the hotel as able to provide a room by 12 30 pm but never offered or informed us about the beverage on arrival Lastly we found Rm 135 was somewhat dark It had a view over the lobby roof looking across to hotel rooms on the other wing Even with the blinds drawn during the daytime there was little direct sun exposure   Great central location 100 meters to Republica Metro Station or a 15 minute walk to Milan Centrale Station The value for money is good It has most the amenities one would expect for hotel of this caliber and price Front desk staff were helpful The room was nicely appointed clean and well maintained A coffee maker would be a nice addition

Even though the time of my visit was during the most important exhibition for furniture in Milan the guest who pays Euros 2 120 plus city tax euros 20 for 5 days expect at least to receive the minimum service corresponding to that money On the contrary what I received was the following 1 Nobody cared if I am a Gold SPG member or not no discussion for upgrade of course 2 It was impossible to have a shower in the morning as you were either freezing or burning 3 The executive room which I booked is rather the smallest standard room of another hotel 4 If you want to have a fresh orange juice or an omelette in the breakfast you have to pay 5 and 8 euros accordingly Otherwise you get a cheap liquid which has the flavor and the color of the orange juice Don t forget that we are talking for a 4 star hotel 5 The sheets were changed in 5 days just once 6 Although they have complimentary coffee in the room they leave you only one small bottle of water free Then you have to be charged So you can have only one cup of coffee and few sips of water 7 The breakfast room is in the basement which have no windows 8 I made the mistake to arrive at 11 00 hrs and I had to wait 3 hours to get the room they respect what they inform you when booking and they keep repeating saying that when somebody complains 9 The rooms are very dark with very less sunlight and with very old furniture In general any traveler has to avoid staying in that hotel For the same money I have stayed in the past in much better hotels as for instance the LA GARE Hotel which is very close to the Four Points Sheraton I had stayed in the La Gare last year but I decided to stay in Four Points Sheraton given that I am a Gold SPG member A mistake which I will never repeat   Literally noting at all and I am not biased

Full_Review: The lifts are an issue long wait one lift doesn t seem to collect just drives up to floor 13 leaving one lift operational returning guests and still hasn t improved Chipped glasses in breakfast dining room a lot in fact staff just responded we know oh dear   Excellent location wonderful roof terrace for drinks rooms very nice and staff courteous Room service speedy and reception staff for visitor questions helpful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooftop terrace was booked for private function Hotel guests are not allowed to use Should keep an area open for guest Very annoying Also no where does it say that the spa facilities are for adults only and it is only open in the evening   The decor was very nice The rooftop is very nice

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: parking was full but alternative has been provided 25 30euro per day whole hotel is very dark elevators are really horribly slow plan some waiting time room rather small  Rooftop Bar Close by metro clean breakfast good

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bed although very comfortable had bed bugs I had bites all over my body and did my friend in another room   I liked the reception area the most

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Pillows to small definetely room for improvement Also the scrambled eggs for breakfast was not good too moist and first day mixed with overcooked boiled eggs centers so was partly blue colour should switch to fried eggs instead but rest of the breakfast was good this just gave it a major letdown   Location from trainstation was very good 3 km walk to Duomo so location also good very clean very nice rooftop bar with excellent view

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The parking reservations is too much as it is 30 per night It is also hard to get to the parking lot You must pass 3 gates to reach the parking lot witch is in the basement Important thing that might happend just for me they didn t change my blanket when they were cleaning my room Also room service give them 1hr to bring what you asked for  Nice location and the designe of the hotel is unique

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The beds were very comfortable with nice linen The pillows were great and there was an ability to change if you did not like what was on the bed The room was a disabled room with NO shower over the bath but a walk in shower Everything was new and spotlessly clean The staff was professional and very helpful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I didn t like that upon check out they told me next time to book directly with them instead of booking com don t bite the hand that feeds you I don t like this would actually prevent me from going back as I happen to be a big fan of booking com  I stay in hotels in milano all the time this was first time here and I think it s great nice roof terrace super close to central station and walking distance to the city Rooms are comfortable and modern

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There was nothing we did not like about this hotel   After spending 3 nights doubled over in our previous accommodation see my review of Hintown Navigli lovers it was a great relief to enter our room here It was clean spacious well appointed and very quiet and comfortable The staff were very pleasant We did not try the restaurant but the rooftop bar is lovely Centrale train station is nearby so the hotel is handy to the Metro system and Malpensa airport We found a great cafe and our favourite Milano ristorante within easy walking distance Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing that I didn t like about the hotel   The room has a modern design and the beds are comfortable The bathroom is spacious Very near to central station not difficult to find the hotel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room switches were brown on brown and a bit confusing And the people from outside the hotel accessing the roof bar clogged the lifts in the evening  Comfortable bed Excellent staff particularly in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Not as close to the center of town as I thought we might be No shuttle to the airport  Nice room modern hotel location good for central train station

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: This was my second trip to LaGare I love the hotel it s super stylish and located a very short walk to central station which makes it a great base to explore both the city via the metro and northern Italy such as Lake Como via trains which take around 45 minutes to get up to the lakes The hotel oozes style there is a fantastic lounge area where you can relax enjoy a coffee beer or wine and watch the day go by Both rooms have been excellent super comfy beds and incredibly clean en suite bathrooms

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I found the lighting a little awkward to work out at first as there are numerous switches in the rooms However this was quickly resolved by room service   The customer service from staff at all levels was excellent as was their knowledge of various languages and the local area They offered help with directions with translation flight check in and transport to the airport which saved me time and money My room was spacious and ready on arrival which was earlier than the regular check in time The food was very good and room service efficient The cafe terrace and rooftop bar and restaurant fabulous I had an amazing time and highly recommend LaGare for business or leisure Thank you LaGare I will not hesitate to visit you again

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Bacon and eggs should be included in the free breakfast But apart from that great place to stay   The rooms were nice and cool on an extremely hot European heatwave The showers has everything to make us feel fresh and comfortable again before we went downstairs and had a delicious dinner and some red wine Upstairs we sipped on some drinks and felt the cool breeze before heading back down to our extremely comfortable bed and watched some movies We were so tired from our trip and we didn t need to go anywhere for a great night it has it all

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The air conditioning never got the room temperature low enough We brought this to the staffs attention but it wasn t improved There wasn t enough power points in the room   Had a good shower and comfortable bed and pillows About one block from Central Railway Nice bar on rooftop and a wellness centre with Turkish bath and spa

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff could have been more helpful Italian people in general not friendly it seems it s all about the money and nothing else  Bed very comfy room on the small side breakfast ok not much choice staff a bit surly and things seem to go in one ear and out the other reception staff not overly knowledgeable some much better than others one who almost shrugged shoulders when asked about which tram to get

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The air condition was not powerfull enough resulting in room temperature was too high   contemporary design international standard roof top terrace good restaurant public spaces

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Very small room booked 1 king bed while they gave me 2 singles didn t change the room when I requested while by booking was confirmed for 1 king bed breakfast is very basic anf if you need omelette you have to pay extra while your room rate have breakfast included already you have to pay extra if you want to use the gym I didn t like it at all doesn t worth to pay this price for such hotel   Actually nothing

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Airconditioner in room was extremely noisy and we couldn t find a way to turn it off So sleeping wasn t as easy as it should have been   Location to centrale station and restaurants around excellent choices and quality

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Wish I could ve had a bath instead of shower apparently there are not many rooms with baths but that s just a personal preference  The lights on the windows were such fun Really good value Wish I d had time to get to the Spa It sounded amazing

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Having to pay an extra 15 euros for breakfast when the room rate was very high already annoyed me but facilities and location very good   5 minute walk from central station easy to find lovely rooms very posh

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooftop bar area was not in service Has great views though   Staff at reception were very welcoming and super helpful Went out of their way to assist me with a problem I was having Room was very clean Beautifully fitted out and relaxing bar area Great service and interesting selection of books and mags to while away the time

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: breakfast should be improved and car park is expensive Also there was dust in the room so I got allergic   design of the hotel is nice and it seems to be quite new

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Extremely modern clean and comfortable room Amazing on the roof bar with a stunning view over the while City Milano Centrale Main Station is just around the Corner

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing  The staff were wonderfully accommodating polite just very very nice The room was comfortable and well appointed Very clean and quiet Lovely view we were on 9th floor perfect stay

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Allergy causing products Square toilet seats Too few elevators   Hotel is near station has excellent gluten free breakfast BUT they spray rooms with perfume that gave me sore throats puffy eyes and coughs Our dry cleaning was washed instead of dry cleaned ruined by hot irons the hotel sain we d have to pay 1500 euros for a test to prove it wasn t their fault

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Complete lack of what should be classified as standard room equipment for a four star hotel No iron in the rooms or tea and coffee facilities Justified by saying it is a health and safety issue However feel free to pay extortionate rates for the hotel to iron it for you Hotels who have had this issue in the past have circumvented these non stringent and non enforced rules by opening a dedicated ironing room for guests If a hotel is rated four star I expect four star standards On another note guests have to also pay for leisure facilities which is restricted to two hours Would I return to this establishment NEVER   Location is good for transport from central station

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff of the hotel was quite unfriendly Tourists seem to be present an unpleasant effort A warm welcome was missing especially at breakfast and on the rooftop bar Even if the hotel is only in the middle price segment it was very dissapointing for us

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The corridors are dark and the heavy mocquette does not help the moving of suitcases around The entrance does not have an easy access as there are quite few steps to do The neighbouroud around the Stazione Centrale at night is not the best Must avoid walking alone around it   The hotel is 2 years old so pretty new plus its location near Stazione Centrale is important for access to Trains or buses to airports

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Away from the historic center and the area is not extraordinary Attention book your seats to enjoy the roof top bar The place is full of Milanese youth from outside   5 10 min walking from the train station and metro Relaxing in the spa after visiting museum and shopping in the quadrilatero de oro Aperetivo time on the roof top bar and enjoying the view on bosco verticale and diamond towers Closed by the Excelsior Hotel and his cigar lounge

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The TV and remote were very complicated to use and many of the channels were not available That is my only complaint   The amazing ceiling shower head and shower and bathroom Walking distance to the train station and restaurants and to Corso Buenos Aires Modern hotel impeccably maintained very nice and professional staff Love how all the windows light up at night

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: IT TAKES BIT LONG TIME FOR LIFT NEAR RECETION   FANTISTIC HOTEL FOR EITHER PURPOSE OF TRIP CLEAN COMFORTABLE AND CONVENIENT SERVICE GOOD AND STAFF COURTEOUS AND AVAIBLE ALWAYS ON REQUEST BREADFAST AND DINNER IN HOTEL DELICIOUS RELLY ENJOY STAYING HERE AND LOOKING FORWARD TO COME IN FUTURE AGAIN

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: nothing  Central location at down town Staff very kind rooms clean and comfortable All public traffic to be reached by walking within 5 minutes lots of good restaurants around late check out without surcharge

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Booked this hotel partly because of the rooftop bar However it was still closed during our stay It would have been helpful is Booking com was able to inform us of this beforehand Maybe a sidenote on the property s page   Nice modern interiors Reception staff were very warm and helpful Room was clean with an amazing view of the city Bathroom was clean with nice modern toilet fixtures

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: For a price of 160 euro per night I would expect to have at least Spa 15 euro additionally included if not also breakfast 12 if you add it when check in The tv did not work and had to be fixed by a technician Further I would expect more languages than Italian and English The rooftop bar was super crowded by people not living in the hotel and therefore uncomfortable to stay at Further the room Temperature was difficult to manage as it got super warm without air conditioning There is music in the halls which we also heard when within our room having the door closed

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Quite a trek to the city centre through an interesting neighbourhood Parking was difficult even when calling beforehand The terrace bar was meant to be open from 1st April yet wasn t when I visited at the end of April   The hotel was modern and comfortable

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The view was just ok we are in the city so not much to see   Beautiful hotel conveniently located right down the street from the main train station lovely d cor an awesome front desk staff who spoke English Nice spacious room with electric black out blinds large bathroom with great shower and comfy bed No complaints We will definitely stay there again when we are in Milan Numerous restaurants nearby when we returned from dinner one night we were amazed to see the exterior lighting on our building multi colored neon around every window stunning Loved the hotel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Small room The hotel corridors are very dark and gloomy part of the modern design but very oppressive Dark walls dark carpets not much lighting The Skyline bar which looked attractive on the photos was closed the evening we were there The breakfast restaurant was quite small and was very crowded It was very hot and stuffy in there to the extent it made me feel sick and I had to leave The breakfast selection was poor few choices of cereal little fresh fruit and you had to pay 8 extra for a fresh omelette The pastries and cakes looked good but they aren t my breakfast preference   The location of the hotel was the main plus for us Close to Milan Central train station so only a few minutes from the centre of Milan by Metro but also convenient to get to airport next morning by train The room had a good modern bathroom and the room had modern smart d cor

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was slightly crammed but cosy   The room was great with a very comfortable bed The overall interior design of the hotel is splendid and there are ample facilities including a gym The colour lights on the exterior of the window also made gave the hotel an overall warm ambience The neighbourhood was also quiet and void of loud noises even in the weekend Yet the location is convenient to get to by metro and is a stone throw s from the train station I would highly recommend this hotel and say that it is well worth the money

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Elevators were the worst They are super slow and at any time there s elevator traffic you have to wait very long for it On Friday there was an event and it was impossible to use the elevator We opted for stairs several times We booked hotel partly because it has nice rooftop terrace After we couldn t get an elevator to go up there we had to take the stairs and discovered that it didn t work Nice view no bar though Breakfast only had 3 warm choices It s only a 4 star hotel I know but I have stayed at 4 star with far better breakfast variety   Hotel is new and very clean walkable distance to the city center Really liked the design and style of rooms and hotel overall Chic Nice new equipment in the small fitness area

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The price might be a bit high and this was our second time here We got a smaller room than before despite paying higher than before Plus we could not have a late checkout even though I requested when booking   The deco of the room

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Information at reception about the terrace It s a beautiful terrace with a fabulous view didn t know what time it opens  Breakfast was very good Lots of choices

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The coffee in the cafe by the lobby is weak and portion is small and the pool in the spa way too much chlorine we couldn t use it too bad as its beautiful functional pool spa other than that all is good

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It would have been nice to have had a kettle and tea making facilities in the room   Great location very close to central train station Friendly and helpful staff Nice lobby with bar area Very quiet and comfortable

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was small and the toilet was dirty when we got in Staff were ok but not the most helpful or friendly Not a great location it s more a business district near to the main station but not much going on around there They also gave us two single beds pushed together instead of the double we requested   Nice spa but costs 15 euros extra and we cold only use in after 5pm

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Automatic shutter blinds blocked sunlight completely providing excellent sleep in exceptionally comfortable bed Check in staff were extremely helpfull

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: You have to pay for the SPA Is this a private gym or something Ridiculous Oh and ridiculous price too Staff couldn t help much at not having an international adapter a day later we found one in the breakfast room finally 2 days later we could get one in our room   The light in the facade

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The lights were a bit confusing but in a short time we found how to operate them  Luxury accommodations very helpful staff who spoke English a short walk to the train station electric shades to keep out light and city noise We arrived one evening and were surprised to see each of the rooms lit with multi colored neon lights it was a spectacular sight Loved this hotel one of our favorites on our recent trip to Italy

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No tea coffee facility in the room which was a little disappointing   Great room very close to Central Station Beautiful restaurant Varied choice at breakfast Helpful staff On site spa is lovely be aware there is a charge to use it

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The room was a little smaller than I expected Air con fan a tad noisy   Very clean The Roof terrace is fantastic Nice light room on the tenth floor with floor to ceiling windows and view of the city Trams almost at the front door and train and metro station a very short walk Cafe prices reasonable Staff pleasant and offered good restaurant suggestion for Easter Sunday night and had the tv fixed same day I reported a problem

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing Loved it   Loved the wellness Centre and fun little touches to the hotel such as the curtain lights Restaurant was delicious Bar had a beautiful view

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The selling points of the hotel were not as good as I could have hoped for Roof bar shut sunny and 24 degrees outside opens in May I clearly didn t spot that in the website Spa hotel not exactly a wellness centre that only opens in the evening no option of any treatments Clearly I didn t spot that on the website either A hotel more suited to business clients I feel   Hotel was in a good location Staff were very helpful Room was as described

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There needs to be more focus on hygiene bed pillow and blanket are not a good idea on white sheets hair alert Rooftop terrace was disappointing no service and mes left behind by other guests was not cleaned   Very nice hotel Elegant modern style without being too pretentious I loved the bicycle facility Staff is very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The reason I rated facilities low was because the air conditioning made a lot of noise and the worst part was that the staff said it was normal I would also think that the room was far too small   Hotel is rather new and facilities are rather new

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: My small niggle could have done with a small teapot at breakfast rather than fishing around in a cup for an errant teabag otherwise range quality of breakfast available is very good   Clean bright and well appointed room V good bathroom shower room Well serviced Reception staff helpful and friendly Friendly staff in bistro good spot for a relaxing glass of something cool after a hard day sightseeing Well placed for access to central station with its travel links train underground trams buses

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Complimentary bottle of water is free just only 1 bottle per stay That s strange Also no response to any of your advance requests neither through booking com nor email   Elegant decoration Clean and comfort

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Location is close to the main train station but nowhere close to major sites in the city More suitable for business travel   Loved the hotel the design and room Did not try the food but the coffee was decent Staff was very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: small room size hardly can move around can t add an extra bed The TV was hard to use since all in Italian not friendly to use  pleasant staff breakfast cleanliness close to central train station and close to restaurants

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I wish they would have had a concierge   The bathroom had a lot of room and had a walking closet which is an asset when you are staying 6 days with a partner

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast service is not good at all very narrow restaurand and only one side of it is used something is missing all the time and before service personal has noticed that you have to raise attention Furthermore personell is not friendly at all   Location of hotel is good close to main station Rooms and bath are allright Lobby is quite nice

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We found the food in the restaurant was a bit fussy overpriced and just ok It was a shame that there was no iron in the room as the cost to have garments ironed was very expensive and this should have been an additional facility available in the room We would also have used the spa much more if it was open in the morning We were also disappointed that the Terrace bar was not open as we would have spent more time in the hotel enjoying evening drinks   The room was lovely and very comfortable with good facilities and cleaned to an excellent standard each day The spa was great to relax in especially the hydra pool and Turkish baths We enjoyed sitting outside the hotel lobby bar with a glass of wine and the accompanying snacks were a lovely touch Breakfast was really tasty with a fabulous selection of fruits pastries hot food and breads

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The shower cabin may be more comfortable and big  The hotel and room are very clear modern and comfortable Personnel are very nice polite and helpful The location is perfect Walking distance to centrale stazione

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Location a ittle nearer to the central station would be perfect The long flight of stairs from the road level to the hotel entrance made it difficult to carry my luggage up and down The porter was however very helpful   Very comfortable and modern room and facilities Linen were superb Breakfast items were healthy and very fresh Service always with a smile The fine dining restaurant on level 4 was excellent and reasonably priced

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The spa is not very spacious and costs 15 per person for 2 hours extra The shower in the bathroom was annoying as the water pressure was very low and the plates that were on the shower floor shifted and tilted while stepping on them I was afraid that I might fall The light in the bathroom and room is not good for applying makeup Confusing lighting system in the room   The bar on the ground floor was good The rooms are spacious and have a good modern design The bathroom offers a good hair dryer The spa is nice and offers some relaxing things like a steam bath a salt grotto almost like a pool and a Finnish sauna the spa is not suitable for children

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Weird cracking noises emitting from somewhere at night time From minibar or ventilation only heard when its off Lack of or broken ventilation in bathroom No way to lock the bathroom   Beautiful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Can honestly say their wasn t anything I didn t like   Room was spotless couldn t of been in a more central location and the staff were so polite

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The entire hotel is Oversee in gaudy lights which flash into every room The lights in the rooms were incredibly hard to turn on kept losing power Room was small Hotel hallway was also very dark Asked for restaurant recommendations and sent me to overpriced tourist joint around the corner   Bed was comfy room was clean shower was good stsff was nice

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: My booking being cancelled by someone and this made me very very cross as I had booked this hotel and trip to milan to get engaged to my girlfriend so WHY would I cancel it also I had used the hotel main website 3 days before to ask about getting airport travel costs but got no response to this at all and then went on trip advisor to see best way to get into city centre The first time we had breakfast at the hotel we hadnt finished our meal and they had the table cleared and that they just wanted us in and out to suit them Getting charged for the spa after getting a room up grade and not getting told on 2 different times that it would go on the bill at the end or that we would have to pay for it Getting first charged 120 euro and then 150 euro by hotel staff with out giving me a paper bill for the cost When i got the bill it was only meant to be 108 50 euro which was the 2 meant to be free spa times if we hadnt got the upgrade We would have only went once to the spa as it was 15 euro each city tax 40 euro and coke and crisps 8 50 no problem paying city tax and coke and crisps because this is what we had to pay and wanted   I liked the roller shutters to keep light out

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The garage is not suitable for the cars So I have to park near the hotel   The hotel is nice and clean Good beds small room Modern well designed and clean

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff especially in the restaurant could have been a little better trained even though they were helpful and attentive Lighting switches in the bedrooms were a little confusing  Black out blinds in bedrooms were excellent Bathrooms were excellent with great showers Staff friendly and very helpful Location great

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Receptionist not helpful and gave wrong informations To enter the hotel there is a flight of stairs and no one to help us with our luggages This hotel is not suitable for people using wheelchair prams or those who have back problems   Location

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Full_Review: The only negative we had were the lifts our room was on the 10th floor and the lifts seemed to be very slow and also quite small often full having to wait for the next lift   Location of the hotel feel and design of the hotel and rooms very modern and contemporary Friendly and helpful staff on hand 24 7 and the views from the rooms and rooftop bar

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No tea or coffee making facilities   Very convenient location great breakfast comfortable and well decorated room Friendly staff and good value price for Milan

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Extremely creaky furniture and by that I mean that I could not sleep half the night it was constant noise and very loud Not sure what was wrong but it was weird Also the windows have led lights on them which stay on all night They change colour which makes for a pretty interesting effect I m sure unless you are trying to sleep in which case it is a lot less fascinating I have trouble sleeping as it is I was exhausted after a long day and with all the creaking and the light it was pretty horrible Finally the problem with the lights was solved by lowering the blinds But I don t particularly see the point of having led lighted windows at night if you re asleep you won t see them anyway It looks pretty from the outside of the hotel but I don t really care how it looks from the outside I m just trying to get a decent night s sleep Could not get the TV to work properly I gave up in the end All buttons for switching on lights are difficult and frustrating to manoeuvre Next door neighbours arrived late at night and were talking loudly I heard every word every door every blind being closed All in all I was pretty annoyed with the place Could only get a couple of hours of decent sleep They charge a fortune for any item that you may inadvertently open from the minibar like a packet of crisps or gummy bears or nuts They were left on the desk I assumed they came free as courtesy as it does in some hotels Just before opening the bag I saw the notice the packet of crisps v small was 4 euros Pretty pricey and no breakfast came with that deal Avoid you can find better I did   Good points Cleanliness v clean Location v well located next to the Stazione Centrale Good Wi Fi fast connection no problem Very friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: more selection for breakfast service was a bit slow value for money wasn t great didn t live up to the standards of the Sofitel breakfasts  convenient location within walking distance from the train station friendly sincere and helpful staff and service top standing Sofitel service and comfort good size rooms that were clean and modern comfortable bed excellent price and value for money

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing  When I realized this was centrally located in the business district rather than the historic district and how great this hotel was I just decided this was a day to be pampered

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Terrace restaurant for lunch was not good Undercooked food and poor service Shower floor was loose tiles   Front desk staff were extremely helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Stay away from this place On my last trip to Milan attracted by the Sofitel brand I made the mistake of staying in this lousy hotel The hotel has a rooftop bar frequented by very unpleasant people who used to circulate drunk on the halls pressing all the elevator buttons when going away To complete the horror of those days I was robbed in the lobby by the time of check out someone stole my brown backpack with all my travel memories plus camera tablet etc I made a Denuncia di Furto at the police station in Linate Airport but the hotel refused to pay for any damages claiming that I did not have that brown backpack Lagare Hotel Milano Centrale is a real tourist trap It was the worst hotel I stayed in in 40 years of world travel If you think of going to Milan forget this option   Nothing

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It would have been good to know that the terrace was closed but since we had the same view from the hotel it was more than ok   We were upgraded to a junior suit on the top floor and we re thrilled

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The standard bedding was a duvet which was far too warm for the season and for which no alternative is provided   We thoroughly enjoyed the common areas cleanliness and staff All exceeded expectations and the access to the main train station is excellent

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Elevator was slow for such an updated place   Beautifully decorated modern hotel Close to train station Breakfast had a good assortment Beds comfortable

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room didn t have tea coffee making facility Room service didn t pickup the phone nor rang back   Brilliant location cozy room comfortable bed sparkling clean modern bathroom relaxing earthy colour tones and view from the room on 11th floor was amazing Would definitely go there again

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooms aren t sound proof and you will hear all you neighbors The construction of the floor in the bathroom is not so good a lot of bacteria could live there No cattle in the room and if you want to have a coffee or tee you will pay 7 EUR for the room service It is too much   The staff was friendly and helpful The room is modern and comfortable with the nice view

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooms are smaller than they appear on the site and you have to pay extra to use the pool and sauna area which doesn t have nearly enough chairs for all the people trying to relax there which seems over the top We got a great deal on this hotel so it wasn t a huge issue but I wouldn t pay full price for the rooms and amenities you get   Very comfy bed and really enjoyed the sauna area a lot despite the added charge Convenient location when arriving by train airport and easy enough to get to the city center by metro or walking

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The staff were super friendly and willing to put up with me speaking poor Italian at them including twittering on about tartaughe I asked for some recommendations for places to eat and things to see and they were able to offer great suggestions The whole hotel oozed style and everything was exceptionally good quality including the bed which meant I had a great night s sleep Location was perfect great to serve as a base for exploring the city Milano Centrale offers both trains to beautiful locations just outside Milan and the underground network to explore the city

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: This hotel was a huge disappointment It was the most expensive in a 6 week holiday all other hotels we stayed at were accurate to the description and room rate except this hotel It listed an outdoor terrace bar that gave great views of Milan sadly both nights we tried to get access it was closed for private functions we were told we could sit at the bar on 1 of the nights but would have to move when asked There was also another outdoor lobby bar which was also closed for a private function on 1 of the nights A swimming pool loungers etc was also listed but this was in fact a spa which cost E15 to enter When we spoke the manager Marco we were told this was a Booking com translation error he seemed unable to grasp that the facilities that they boasted were not actually available to their guests Marco did little to appease us except offer a free spa that we did not want

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No wardrobe in room Elevator was stuck 3 times and got locked in Too many floors 13 and elevator slow and not nice if you have height fobia or clostrofobia  Great lobby and roof bar

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Some extra pillows and a bathrobe in the room would have been nice and it was quite expensive There aren t many good restaurants or bars in the immediate vicinity but the metro is 5 mins away   Nice clean modern hotel Rooms are an adequate size Breakfast options were grand and the terraces are nice to sit and enjoy a drink The hotel is a 5 min walk to the Central station

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The breakfast was a shambles Staff were overrun and struggling to cope There was no water coffee half of the food was finished and very slow to be replaced Location of things was a bit awkward and not explained to us There were 3 separate stations spread across the room so people were walking up and down the room constantly We noticed people were starting to complain so decided to leave and avoid the controversy This was a real let down for us considering we had to pay more to have the breakfast included   The reception staff were very friendly and welcoming Shout out to Luigi and Margarita who were very helpful with dinner recommendations and things to do and see

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The neon lights in the frame of each window is an odd touch  Staff at the front desk were very friendly and knowledgeable to a first time couple in Milan

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: hotel does not put free drinking water plastic nottles house keeping miss to put toilet tissu enough in the toilet  Location Services Staff

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: It wasn t in central Milan but we did select it for its proximity to the train   A very modern hotel that was incredibly convenient to the train station for our early morning departure to MXP

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Stairs up to main Lobby are difficult to navigate with cases if there is no assistance The room was a little pokey but sufficient for our purpose A sign at the railway station would be helpful for those arriving by train as to the direction of the hotel   From the moment we arrived and greeted by the bell boy who immediately took our cases into reception we felt this was a nice place to stay pleasant and helpful reception staff had us registered and in our room quickly The breakfast was a great choice of food pleasantly and efficiently served My request for help in checking a transfer with Emirates was handled with courtesy and efficiency and followed up by an email left in our room confirming all the details The room though small provided adequate space for a 2 night stay

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There are not a lot of food options immediately near the property Additional hotel services were quite expensive The front desk claimed not to be able to loan me a clothes iron citing fire regulations even though I ve had them in many other rooms I ve stayed in while visiting Milan Instead they wanted to charge me 3 euro per article of clothing I wanted pressed   Very large room comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: small room poor facilities unable cancel unless paying full fee altough booked as free cancellaion promotes free bike but u need pay deposit euro 300 its not a problem if this is clearly stated when booking not worth money and not upto 4 stars  friendly staff good location standard accor quality

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Lousy management badly staffed in security and doorman bell boy My bag was stolen from inside the lobby during check in as shown by camera I just was told to report to police so they claim from insurance Told to me by reception person the manager did not bother to even talk to me  Reception staff were great and house keeping

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Service is poor at times You must call several times before you get the service you need Room service food is also not that great  Great place to stay Amazing facilities

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: They ran out of beer all beer on Sunday and they generally showed to have lots of types of wine but again ran out of most of these There was also a very slow service in the cafe bar on the Saturday which resulted in us actually giving up and going out for a drink instead Beds hurt my back  The Parma ham and mozzarella starter in the restaurant was AMAZING My partner is Italian and agreed it was the best he d ever tasted The restaurant was pretty empty the night we tried it Saturday buy the food was exceptional Really top quality for all 3 courses

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: New and modern hotel The bed was very comfortable Very good breakfast The location is very convenient if you want to be close to the central train station

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: There are STAIRS in the front door with no lift and escalator so you need to carry your 50Kg luggage up to the lobby The room door is a bit tricky to open ask your staff   close to the milan station and metro easy transport The gym machine in the gym room is quite funny worth visit Friendly staff P S the rooftop bar is full of business people around 18 00 so dress up and make a reservation in advance

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: This was a fantastic hotel Clean super modern and very luxurious It is located 5 minutes walk from Central Station and is quiet at night Luigi on the front desk gave us outstanding service from the moment we arrived through to check out 10 10

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Location is perfect very close to the central railway station yet in a quiet area Staff is very helpful room is nice and spacious bed is very comfortable Perfect hotel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 1 Booking com need to give clear directions to this hotel Following the small map would only make sense with a description of which doors and street to use to exit the station 2 We were allocated a room better suited to disabled guests with a shower and plastic curtain and no shelf space for makeup 3 Water bottles were only provided on the first day and the Wellness center is expensive 4 There are only two main elevators serving twelve floors This is not adequate especially when the hotel allows private functions leaving paying guests resorting to the stairwell When we finally made it up to the roof top terrace for a quiet drink we found it overcrowded and the noisy private group took most of the tables 5 The breakfast staff should have checked with reception before we were accused of not prepaying for it An apology was only offered after we took up the issue with management 6 Based on previous McGallery experiences I fail to see how this hotel qualifies   The bed was comfortable the dinner menu good and reception staff helpful but overall a negative experience

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: thought the drink prices on the roof top bar were a bit steep plus there was a pre booked birthday party non staying guest on so we were shoved into one corner of the roof with small tables chairs whilst they had all the best seats views  stayed in an exec suite on the 12 floor with a balcony views etc were great

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I had to solve parking problem by myself there were no free parking spaces in the hotel so hotel staff asked me to go to some garage nearby the hotel but couldn t find anybody there Parked a car on the street  Room design Room cleaning View from a window Room amenities Metro station in a few minutes walking Wi Fi quality is great

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Ask to have a late checkout as we had a international flight out in the evening Was initially told this would be fine The next day we confirmed and were then told this was not possible and offered no other solutions by the staff We were not happy and ended up having to book an additional hotel   Close to train station and fairly modern

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: My daughter was sick and threw up on the bed we inform them on the phone to change the bedsheet but we can still smell the vomit so I think they didn t change it And the shower room has mould We are on the first floor   Nothing

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We really looked forward to the rooftop bar but it turned out to be very clubby and more for outside parties than for the guests of the hotel   Very modern and clean rooms The staff was very helpful with suggestions

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We had an overbooking for two weeks there were two rooms reserved under the same name While this was obviously a mistake the hotel never mentioned this until we checked out and forced us to pay for both rooms The roof terrace restaurant is bad and overpriced I ordered a glass of red wine and received a glass of almost boiling Cabernet The bottle was obviously stored in the sun When I complained the waitress told me that red wine isn t supposed to be cold and offered me to put a bottle on ice She did not take the wine back and charged us 15 Euros for the 0 1 litres of red wine and 10 Euros for a small beer Rip off   The rooms and the hotel are nice the location is very convenient next to the main train station airport express The breakfast is good

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The rooftop bar is more of a local bar for any one and is loud until 12  The room was contemporary well kept clean It had fantastic air conditioning And was quiet The facility s were fantastic you have to check out the spa

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Hotel is situated in perfect location in walk distance from Milan central station and Metro station Room was tidy and very comfy especially bed Additionally big plus is that hotel is providing electric bikes free of charge which makes transport to city center even easier and you can avoid public transport Staff was good

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The service at breakfast wasn t very good   Lovely facilities Great location near train station The rooms were very nice and they had a lot of detail

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: No coffee maker in the room  The location is close to Milano Centrale train station which isn t the prettiest area but very convenient The hotel is also just on the edge of the Brera neighbourhood and close to Porta Garibaldi great areas with lot s of bars shops and nightlife The hotel itself is very nice and modern has comfortable beds and all basic amenities The staff are friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Room was noisy and uncomfortable Not the standard we are used to from a four star hotel There were no dressing gowns or tea coffee making facilities Also no wardrobe doors which felt very strange  Hotel staff pleasant helpful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Reception staff unfriendly abrupt initially tried to tell us we weren t booked in despite us showing them our booking confirmation email Spa doesn t open until 5pm not sure why and because we had evening plans the 2 nights we were there we missed out on using spa which we had intended to use morning or afternoon the spa facilities had been the main factor in choosing this hotel We didn t get to use it The waiting staff on the roof top terrace bar were terrible it took 15 mins to be served then our drinks 2 juices didn t arrive after another 15 minutes so we left A conference party had arrived the staff weren t interested in us We weren t impressed at all We would try another hotel if we go back to Milan   The woman serving on the coffee croissant bar in the lobby was lovely very attentive She gave us some great customer service Our room was very clean modern bathroom nice The hotel itself was lovely the lack of customer care let it down

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The bar prices in the hotel were extremly high In particularly the roof top bar which was 50 more than the down stairs bar Aperol spritz 15 The hotel also shut the down stairs bar on a Saturday

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Staff too few unfriendly unhelpful We booked bicycles as offered on the booking page Forget it There are no bicycles I made a formal complaint but they didn t respond Pictures of top floor terrace with city views are misleading because the top floor is actually only for functions No views from the public areas   Good bed though hardly big enough to call a king size Food just mediocre quality and value but plentiful

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Area carpet in bedroom could take a more thorough vacuuming See comments above regarding sauna room One of 2 bathrobes we had didn t seem fresh   Great location within walking distance to Stazione Centrale Spacious luxurious room Huge bathroom and a separate sauna room which was a bonus which we didn t have time to use though This was also the con the ceiling had molds good thing we didn t care to use the sauna and it was not connected to the bathroom All in all I d say LaGare is affordable luxury We had a very relaxing overnight stay Would stay there again

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Unfriendly unhelpful staff yes you can eggs fried but you will need to pay No tea or coffee facilities in the room Very dark and gloomy everywhere Shower little more than light rain no power whatsoever One pillow each You can have some light bites in the evening but as we were informed by reception ONLY if you buy a drink Breakfast was very poor rotting bananas in the fruit bowls and fruit flies Warm milk for cereal Bacon dripping in fat Tea and coffee is self service and lukewarm Slippers supplied but no housecoats   Little to like really The cost of the superior room was 170 euro way more than other hotels of equal rating

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Nothing  Hotel is in great location near central station Boutique style hotel and 100 clean and all the staff was fab couldn t do enough for you always smiling Davide the bar man ace And the spa is stunning 1st hour free then 15 euros after the hour Food glorious I couldn t fault anything with this hotel can t wait to go back And visit there other hotel in venice

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The location though convenient for the main railway station and business district is charmless   Impeccable modern hotel well run spotless and comfortable Good buffet breakfast

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Breakfast was not that good mainly because of poor coffee You don t expect this sort of coffee in Italy especially in a 4 star hotel We only had breakfast there once If you do not necessarily need eggs and bacon check out many cafes nearby for wonderful coffee and pastry Much better and cheaper Another issue was decorative pillows on the bed I am pretty sure they caused severe allergy for me On a third night I removed them far away from the bed and it was better If you have allergies be aware I suggest the hotel staff to take this seriously and check those pillows and the rooms in general for allergies Some people might have very strong allergic reactions   Quality of facilities was great Location is great close to the Central station two metro lines and trams

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Service in the bar was not adequate for a 4 star hotel Waited more than 20 minutes to order Staff at the reception was very friendly Loud air condition   Location is very central Very modern room

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: the entrance of the room is dark and even with lights it is not enough also you have to insert the card of room in a special place which is hidden and directly clear At check out the have asked for extra city tax which they did not ask before at check in  close to central station assistance from employees look of the room

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: 200 Euro went missing during our stay The hotel did their best and checked the security tapes and room log but no evidence could be found of any wrong doing Given that I had withdrawn the money just a few hours previously and that I then got changed to go to the gym there really is very little chance the money was mislaid elsewhere The hotel were very helpful but ultimately their comment of course we believe you I could only excuse on the basis that perhaps their English wasn t very good Either way if you re staying here just use the safe a bit more than you normally would perhaps The rooms are a little smaller than they appear in the literature but overall it s such good value that there is not reason to complain   The deal we got was amazing Relative to other Milan hotels with spa and this level of facilites LaGare offers incredible value for money There s also a great Japanese restaurant and fantastic Mexican restaurant nearby

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The Spa was the highlight of our stay Beautiful sauna and relaxtion area The staff dealt with all our requests immediately and everyone was so nice and friendly Would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: The Hotel didn t have an elevator or ramp to take the luggage up from the entrance you should climb many stairs with luggage or leave it outside for calling the carrier boy   breakfast

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I frequently travel to big conurbation like Paris New York Tokyo and other but it was my only 2nd time I was visiting Milan As everybody knows the standard of the hotel has nothing common with the number of stars In this case we were seduced by the good opinions probably from the hotel personnel Despite the fact that the hotel was almost empty not very friendly receptionist offered us a room on the 1st floor with a small window overlooking the dustbin and the office building very close to the hotel facade we have to close the curtains during the day But first we were hesitating to take the room almost on the ground afraid of the noise from the street but the receptionist told us that other room will be prepared in 3 ours she did not look convincing as we did not want to waste time we took the keys We had to carry our luggage ourselves to the room not very far but still it supposed to be 4th star hotel Despite passing next to the reception several times during the stay staff was not interested in the guests too much not even once we ve heard good morning Toilet acted reluctantly and water barely flowed from the shower Even though the rooms had to be sound proof everything from the room next door was audible Location of the hotel is rather average and for the money it was offered you can find much better hotels in Milano Not recommended

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Atmosphere environment and limited range of options in hotel restaurant restaurant prices were not extortionate given quality of food cooking but did feel a touch too expensive given negatives Rooftop bar was not open during my stay   Close to the main station in Milan very handy when arriving late into Milano Centrale station Extensive Sky TV package Good quality food in restaurant

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: I got a room that was not cleaned after previous gust and they needed to change it They orderd a normal taxi for me and the driver asked for 30 additional euro as a fee for the hotel  Location

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Full_Review: Only a few guest in the restaurant but it took more than half an hour to get the bill A menu has been ordered two times but nevertheless beef has been served instead of salmon Check the bills in bar and restaurant   Though about ten persons wanted to check in Saturday night the manager on duty was very friendly and full of patience The rooms are good equipped Food in restaurant and at breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: Full of disappointment staying in this hotel We were shocked to find out that there was feces in the toilet when we entered the room The steamed bathing room was originally a good design but it kept dripping water which made us could not sleep at night The lighting effect on the wall of the building was disturbing which forced us to close the curtain Arrangement for breakfast was messy with limited food Staff were not really helpful with no smile on their faces except when we checked out We did not enjoy our 3 nights stay at all   It is located near Milan Centrale

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: We booked a suite the tv in the lounge area did not work which meant the lounge area was a waste of money we had to speak to reception on FOUR seperate occasions over 2 days before someone came to the room we were then told the sky didn t work No coffee facilities in the room we were told they were hoping to rectify the situation A four star hotel should not be letting people down on these points would I stop there again they will have to improve   Location was close to 2 of the main rail stations and was picked for that reason The waiters in the resteraunt were excellent and the decor was fantastic

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
Full_Review: For a 4 star hotel I would have expected that the spa area is free of charge for guests The rain shower head room 6 on floor 10 needs some maintenance as water was not coming out easily and strongly enough because of lime   The hotel is very conveniently located near the Central Station The design room was very comfortable with a big and good bed The New Year s dinner was excellent with a good menu of several courses and tasty prosecco and wines Staff at the reception was very friendly

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel

Hotel_Name: LaGare Hotel Milano Centrale MGallery by Sofitel
